title: SELECT on window function causes a segfault
description:
mrigger added on 2019-12-22 17:53:58:
The following test case results in a segfault:
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 UNIQUE);
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE(c0, 0) IN(SELECT FIRST_VALUE(0) OVER(), 0); -- Segmentation fault
I think this bug was introduced in one of the last commits.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 FLOAT, UNIQUE(c1, c2));
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES(1, 'test', 1.1);
CREATE TABLE t2(c4 INT, c5 INT DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE (c1, c3) IN (SELECT c1, 1.1 FROM (SELECT c1, c3 FROM t1 ORDER BY c1 LIMIT 1) AS subquery);
key_bug_features: SELECT on window function causes segmentation fault
